objective: Preserve the Remote MCP Bridge planning, cross-review, waiver, and session handoff artifacts on main before deleting stale remote branches.
scope_boundary: Restore issue #109 planning artifacts from origin/feat/remote-mcp-bridge into canonical raw artifact paths.
Restore the active SOM-RMB-ROUND2-WAIVED-001 exception register entry.
Update stale local worktree references to repo-local raw artifact paths.
Record PDCAR, execution scope, validation, and Stage 6 closeout evidence for the preservation slice.
Delete stale remote branches only after preservation has merged and validation has passed.
out_of_scope: Implementing Cloud -> Local MCP Bridge stages A-D.
Changing Remote MCP Bridge architecture semantics.
Changing Society of Minds hard-rule invariants.
research_summary: Remote branch audit found two remaining branches. docs/windows-ollama-sprint3-closeout is redundant because its substantive closeout and decision artifacts already match main. feat/remote-mcp-bridge contains the issue #109 plan, rejected cross-review/resolution artifact, handoff, and active round-2 waiver missing from main. Main already references the plan path from Windows-Ollama artifacts, so preserving the plan before remote branch cleanup avoids losing governance history.

sprints.name: Artifact preservation and branch cleanup
sprints.goal: Move useful governance history from stale remote branches onto main, prove it locally, and then remove stale remote branches.
tasks: Restore the Remote MCP Bridge plan, cross-review/resolution, and handoff artifacts.
Restore SOM-RMB-ROUND2-WAIVED-001 in the exception register.
Replace stale private worktree references with canonical repo-local artifact references.
Record issue #109 PDCAR, structured plan, execution scope, validation, and closeout evidence.
Run local validation and Local CI Gate.
Open and merge the preservation PR, then delete stale remote branches.
acceptance_criteria: Issue #109 referenced artifacts exist on main after merge.
Current parser gates can parse the historical cross-review artifact.
No stale _worktrees/gov-remote-mcp plan references remain in tracked docs.
docs/windows-ollama-sprint3-closeout has no unique substantive artifact not already on main.
Local CI Gate and GitHub PR checks pass before remote branch deletion.

specialist_reviews.summary: The change preserves historical documentation and does not alter architecture or implementation behavior.

alternate_model_review.summary: This slice preserves existing issue #109 artifacts. The historical architecture artifact already records the original cross-family review and operator waiver.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #109 may restore its missing raw planning artifacts, exception register waiver, stale reference cleanup, and slice evidence artifacts before stale remote branch cleanup.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run local validation, PR checks, merge, delete stale remote branches, and update issue #109 with canonical main links.

material_deviation_rules: If Local CI treats the historical rejected cross-review as a current approval artifact, stop and move it to a non-enforced historical path in a separate issue-backed patch.
If Remote MCP implementation changes are needed, keep them out of this slice and track them under #109 follow-up stages.
If either stale branch has unique implementation code, do not delete it until that code is separately preserved or explicitly abandoned.
